sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id UInt32, event_time DateTime64(3), user_timezone String);
SELECT id, fromUTCTimestamp(event_time, user_timezone) AS local_time FROM test_dates WHERE user_timezone IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, fromUTCTimestamp((SELECT MAX(event_time) FROM test_dates WHERE user_timezone = 'Asia/Shanghai'), 'UTC') AS max_local_time FROM test_dates GROUP BY id;
SELECT id, fromUTCTimestamp(toDateTime64(CAST(id AS String), 3), user_timezone) FROM test_dates HAVING local_time IS NOT NULL;

SELECT *, (fromUTCTimestamp(event_time, user_timezone), event_time) AS timestamp_tuple FROM test_dates WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_dates WHERE user_timezone LIKE '%Asia%') ORDER BY event_time DESC;
SELECT id, (fromUTCTimestamp(event_time, user_timezone), COUNT(*)) AS count_tuple FROM test_dates GROUP BY id ORDER BY count_tuple[2] DESC;
CREATE TABLE temp_dates AS SELECT id, fromUTCTimestamp(event_time, 'UTC') AS utc_time FROM test_dates;
INSERT INTO temp_dates SELECT id, fromUTCTimestamp(toDateTime64('2020-02-29 12:00:00', 3), 'Asia/Tokyo') FROM test_dates WHERE id < 3;
